title: Father Clement's Fuel Authorization Chit
description: A handwritten slip of paper recovered from Darnell Arceneaux's shirt pocket, reading: 'Bearer authorized 8 gallons marine fuel — Claiborne staging — C. Tureaud.' The slip is dated September 1 and uses the same self-generated authorization code found in the supply ledger. It confirms that Father Clement has been compensating Darnell for supply runs with fuel from an undisclosed reserve — and that the Claiborne Avenue staging point exists and is stocked.
